## Summary

Build and review browser dashboard shells that fill the viewport cleanly across phone, laptop, ultrawide, and wall/TV displays. Use when creating or auditing…

## Description

Build and review browser dashboard shells that fill the viewport cleanly across phone, laptop, ultrawide, and wall/TV displays. Use when creating or auditing operator dashboards, product hubs, dense tools pages, responsive dashboard grids, sidebar layouts, or full-viewport web app shells.

## Invoke

Use **full-viewport-responsive-dashboard-shell**.

`run-full`, `check-viewport`, `build-responsive`
